Container.Name: vibe-kanban-cloud
Container.Overview: Deploy Vibe Kanban Cloud on UnRAID. This is a true Docker-in-Docker wrapper that runs the entire Cloud stack (remote-server, Postgres, ElectricSQL, Caddy). Important: You MUST use Privileged mode. For Local setups without domain, enter your local IP in DOMAIN and it will auto-generate an SSL cert you can find in your appdata. For External proxies (Nginx/Traefik), set USE_EXTERNAL_PROXY to true and map the External App Port.
Container.Requires: This container requires Privileged mode to run its internal Docker daemon (True Docker-in-Docker).

Config.Name: Port: HTTP (Internal Proxy)
Config.Description: Internal Caddy HTTP Port (used if USE_EXTERNAL_PROXY=false).

Config.Name: Port: HTTPS (Internal Proxy)
Config.Description: Internal Caddy HTTPS Port (used if USE_EXTERNAL_PROXY=false).

Config.Name: Port: External App (Direct)
Config.Description: Direct access to Vibe Kanban App (used if USE_EXTERNAL_PROXY=true). Point your external reverse proxy to this port.

Config.Name: Path: Appdata Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for all data (database, electric, SSL certs, generated secrets in .env).

Config.Name: Variable: Domain (IP or FQDN)
Config.Description: Your domain. If you enter a local IP/hostname (e.g. 192.168.x.x), Caddy uses internal SSL. If public FQDN, Caddy uses Let's Encrypt.

Config.Name: Variable: External Proxy Mode
Config.Description: Set to 'true' if you use Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik, or an external Caddy. This disables the internal Caddy.

Config.Name: Variable: TLS Email
Config.Description: (Optional) Email address for Let's Encrypt ACME registration if you use a public domain and internal Caddy.

Config.Name: --- Local Authentication ---
Config.Description: Bootstrap credentials for initial setup without OAuth.

Config.Name: Variable: Local Admin Email
Config.Description: The email address to use for the bootstrap admin.

Config.Name: Variable: Local Admin Password
Config.Description: Secure password for the bootstrap admin.

Config.Name: Variable: PUID
Config.Description: Container User ID for file ownership in /data (default: 99).

Config.Name: Variable: PGID
Config.Description: Container Group ID for file ownership in /data (default: 100).
